purpose: Prompt-specific asset selection for: a laptop is on the right side of a knife.
mvp_prompt: a laptop is on the right side of a knife

agent_usage.designer: Select laptop and knife assets from the master catalog. Satisfy right-of using the robot/dual-arm first-person viewpoint.
agent_usage.critic: Check the robot-centric right-of relation, laptop URDF loading, knife static placement, collision, and visual prompt match after render.
